facebook.content_angle: What your race suit is actually doing for you — how premium Italian fabric tech and compression translate to real race-day speed gains, timed to the NZ 2026 competition calendar dropping
facebook.post_text:
The 2026 NZ swim calendar is locked in. Is your suit doing its job? 🏁

A lot of swimmers train hard but overlook one of the easiest performance gains on race day — what they wear in the water.

A quality competition suit isn't just about looks. **Italian-engineered compression fabric** actively supports your body position, reduces frontal drag, and keeps your muscles firing efficiently when fatigue sets in. That's not marketing — it's physics.

If you are hitting the start line this season, your gear should be working as hard as you are. 💪

Shop the Velocx NZ range and head into race season ready.
facebook.call_to_action: Shop the Velocx NZ range and head into race season ready.
